think_blocks:
The user wants me to identify all time segments where the New Era logo is visible in the video.

1.  **Analyze the Request:**
    *   Target: New Era logo (the "NE" flag logo).
    *   Condition: Visible on screen, even if small or brief.
    *   Segmentation: Start a new segment when the logo enters, close when it exits. Split when size changes significantly.
    *   Output Format: JSON.

2.  **Scan the Video for the Logo:**
    *   **00:06 - 00:18:** Close-up of the pitcher (Bumgarner). The logo is clearly visible on the side of his cap. It's a medium-sized logo relative to the frame.
    *   **00:18 - 00:21:** Shot of the Dodgers dugout. Several players are wearing caps with the logo. It's small due to distance.
    *   **00:27 - 00:36:** Another shot of the Dodgers dugout. The logo is visible on the caps of the players sitting there. Small size.
    *   **00:45 - 00:52:** Close-up of Bumgarner again. Logo is visible on his cap. Medium size.
    *   **00:52 - 01:04:** Close-up of Max Muncy. Logo is visible on his cap. Medium size.
    *   **01:10 - 01:18:** Close-up of Max Muncy again. Logo is visible. Medium size.
    *   **01:31 - 01:33:** Close-up of a Dodgers player (Freeman). Logo is visible. Medium size.
    *   **01:33 - 01:41:** Kershaw walking off the mound. Logo is visible on the back/side of his cap. Medium size.
    *   **01:55 - 02:02:** Close-up of an Arizona player (Moreno). Logo is visible on his helmet. Medium size.
    *   **02:14 - 02:20:** Close-up of Moreno again. Logo visible. Medium size.
    *   **02:20 - 02:23:** Close-up of Kershaw. Logo visible. Medium size.
    *   **02:32 - 02:37:** Close-up of Kershaw. Logo visible. Medium size.
    *   **02:53 - 03:06:** Close-up of Moreno walking. Logo visible. Medium size.
    *   **03:16 - 03:24:** Close-up of Alek Thomas. Logo visible on his helmet. Medium size.
    *   **03:48 - 03:54:** Close-up of Arizona players. Logo visible on helmets. Medium size.
    *   **04:11 - 04:19:** Close-up of Arizona players. Logo visible on helmets. Medium size.
    *   **04:28 - 04:33:** Close-up of Kershaw. Logo visible. Medium size.
    *   **04:39 - 04:47:** Close-up of Kyle Lewis. Logo visible on his helmet. Medium size.
    *   **04:57 - 05:09:** Close-up of Kyle Lewis. Logo visible. Medium size.
    *   **05:21 - 05:30:** Close-up of Kyle Lewis. Logo visible. Medium size.
    *   **05:41 - 05:43:** Close-up of Kyle Lewis. Logo visible. Medium size.
    *   **05:51 - 06:06:** Close-up of Kershaw. Logo visible. Medium size.
    *   **06:16 - 06:20:** Close-up of Ketel Marte. Logo visible on his helmet. Medium size.
    *   **06:30 - 06:35:** Close-up of Ketel Marte. Logo visible. Medium size.
    *   **06:35 - 06:40:** Close-up of Kershaw. Logo visible. Medium size.
    *   **06:53 - 07:09:** Close-up of Ketel Marte. Logo visible. Medium size.
    *   **07:20 - 07:27:** Close-up of Kershaw. Logo visible. Medium size.
    *   **07:41 - 07:57:** Close-up of Chris Taylor. Logo visible on his helmet. Medium size.
    *   **08:03 - 08:12:** Close-up of Chris Taylor. Logo visible. Medium size.
    *   **08:23 - 08:25:** Close-up of Bumgarner. Logo visible. Medium size.

3.  **Consolidate and Refine Segments:**
    *   I will group consecutive close-ups of the same player or similar shots if they are very close in time, but the prompt asks to split when size changes significantly. Most of these are distinct cuts between players or angles, so I'll list them as separate segments where the logo is clearly the focus or part of a close-up.
    *   The dugout shots (00:18, 00:27) are distinct from the close-ups.
    *   I'll create segments for each distinct appearance.

    *   Segment 1: 00:06 - 00:18 (Bumgarner close-up)
    *   Segment 2: 00:18 - 00:21 (Dugout wide shot)

    *   Segment 30: 08:23 - 08:25 (Bumgarner close-up)
